Representative_Docs: ['i am submitting this formal complaint regarding serious inconsistencies lack of transparency and potentially misleading representations made in connection with my mortgage account with rocket mortgage llc previously serviced by mr cooper for the property located at timeline and nature of my request on xx xx i submitted an application for mortgage assistance due to a temporary medical hardship important clarification i was not requesting a loan modification a deed in lieu a short sale my arrears were relatively small approximately based on my statement and my intent was only to explore the possibility of short term repayment arrangements in installments i did not seek to alter the terms of my loan or relinquish my property on that same date i received a notice indicating that a review process would be conducted and that no further action was required from me i would like to clarify that the delinquency on my account is not the result of irresponsibility or unwillingness to meet my obligations i have been managing a serious medical condition for several years which has at times prevented me from working consistently during this period my daughterwho previously contributed to the householdenlisted in the in xx xx further impacting my financial stability despite these challenges i have remained fully committed to maintaining my home which is my primary residence and source of stability i have never refinanced or extracted equity from this property as my intention has always been to preserve it as my long term residence i am now experiencing a positive development in my medical care having recently received a diagnosis and a potential treatment plan which i am hopeful will allow me to stabilize my health and income moving forward mischaracterization of my application in the response dated xx xx i was evaluated for multiple loss mitigation options including modification declined deed in lieu approved short sale approved this evaluation does not reflect my request additionally the letter references a review of my income for modification purposes however i was never asked to provide income documentation at any point this raises serious concerns regarding the accuracy and validity of the evaluation process additionally the property has substantial equity approximately which is reflected in the servicers own records given this i am concerned that my request for a simple repayment arrangement for a relatively small arrearage was not meaningfully considered while non retention options such as a deed in lieu or short sale were presented reinstatement definition and lack of fee disclosure the xx xx letter defines reinstatement as a reinstatement is a single lump sum payment to bring the mortgage current by paying all past due amounts including amounts paid on a borrowers behalf it further instructs to reinstate your mortgage please refer to your monthly billing statement at no point does this letter mention attorney fees disclose legal costs indicate that reinstatement includes foreclosure related fees the phrase amounts paid on a borrowers behalf reasonably refers to escrow advances such as taxes and does not clearly disclose legal fees conflicting amounts and accounting discrepancies there are multiple conflicting balances across the servicers own documents unapplied funds letter xx xx total due unapplied funds based on those figures the adjusted balance would be approximately xx xx total amount due these figures do not reconcile there has been no explanation of these discrepancies no itemization of charges no disclosure of any legal or third party fees this prevents me from determining the actual amount required to reinstate my loan prior experience with inflated legal fees i raise this concern based on prior experience where an arrearage of approximately resulted in more than in attorney fees this type of escalation effectively eliminates a borrowers ability to cure a default it is deeply concerning when foreclosure is advanced under the premise of delinquency while in practice the barrier to reinstatement becomes excessive and undisclosed legal fees that far exceed the actual arrears misrepresentation of foreclosure status on xx xx at approximately i received a phone call from a representative of the servicer and was told that my home was already in foreclosure and that i could not make any payment until attorney fees were added however as of today xx xx at approximately i conducted a search of the of deeds and no foreclosure affidavit has been filed no notice of sale has been recorded no foreclosure related filings exist this statement appears to be false or misleading and caused significant concern regulatory concerns based on the above i respectfully request investigation into the following failure to clearly disclose all fees including legal fees conflicting and inconsistent reinstatement amounts evaluation for programs not requested by the borrower lack of income documentation despite references to income review misrepresentation of foreclosure status potential unfair or deceptive servicing practices i am ready and willing to immediately cure the default based on the servicers own documented amounts however i am being prevented from doing so due to the introduction of undisclosed and unverified charges creating an imminent risk of unnecessary escalation requested regulatory action i respectfully request that the cfpb review this matter and take appropriate action to ensure that i am provided a fair and lawful opportunity to cure the default on my mortgage specifically i request that the cfpb ensure that i am allowed to reinstate my mortgage based on the amount reflected in the servicers most recent monthly billing statement dated xx xx in the amount of the unapplied funds in the amount of are properly credited toward my account the servicer is not permitted to refuse or delay acceptance of payment based on anticipated or undisclosed charges the servicer is not permitted to impose retroactive or undisclosed fees including attorney fees where no such fees have been documented or disclosed in writing i am provided a clear and immediate path to submit payment and bring my loan current without being subjected to inconsistent or shifting payoff figures thank you for your attention to this urgent matter', 'i am submitting a complaint regarding the servicing of my mortgage loan by community bank n a specifically relating to an escrow adjustment credit reporting during an active dispute and the bank s failure to provide clear accurate and actionable information required to bring my account current prior to this matter i maintained a perfect payment history on this loan and had never been delinquent my family and i have banked with community bank for decades and i expected reasonable treatment clear communication and appropriate duty of care key timeline xx xx escrow driven payment increase and initial attempts to understand and dispute the change xx xx formal notice of error submitted xx xx bank response not received until xx xx week of xx xx materially incorrect payoff amount provided xx xx correct amount finally provided and paid the issue began in xx xx when my monthly payment increased significantly due to an escrow recalculation rising from approximately to the nature of the increase itself made it extraordinarily difficult to understand without outside assistance the underlying cause a tenfold increase in property taxes resulting from a change in ownership structure and the loss of associated income based deductions was never explained to me by the bank i came to understand it only after extensive independent research and direct conversations with town and state tax representatives until that point the dramatic increase appeared to be a clear error consistent with missing homestead credits at no point did the bank provide an explanation that allowed me to understand what had actually driven the payment change this further reinforced my belief that the account was subject to a legitimate error requiring correction and that the dispute was valid there are also unresolved issues regarding missing homestead credits that should reduce the underlying tax bills i have been actively working with the and to correct these items a process that overlapped with the holiday period and introduced unavoidable administrative delays from xx xx onward i made sustained good faith efforts to understand and resolve the adjustment however i encountered repeated servicing and communication failures that materially impaired my ability to do so including being repeatedly routed between departments without a single accountable point of contact over the course of this matter i was directed to contact no fewer than different representatives including and across multiple departments none of whom had continuity of knowledge about the account inconsistent and conflicting information regarding submitted documents inability to obtain confirmation of document receipt incorrect internal contact information preventing callbacks delays in Representative_Docs: ['i am submitting a complaint regarding a deferred interest charge applied to my synchrony bank credit card received through mattress firm i entered into a promotional financing retroactively to the full original balance if not paid in full within the promotional period the original purchase amount was based on the structure of the promotion i would have needed to make significantly higher monthly payments to avoid interest which was not clearly communicated to me at the time i made consistent payments of per month in good faith while the minimum payment was approximately per month believing i was complying with the terms of a interest promotion at no point was it made clear that these payments would be insufficient to avoid a retroactive interest charge or that i needed to meet a specific payoff deadline to avoid substantial penalties i was subsequently charged deferred interest on the full original balance which was unexpected and not clearly explained in a transparent or understandable manner at the time of the transaction as of xx xx my account balance was on xx xx then deferred interest was charged to me in the balance of apr i am attaching screenshot from my synchrony online account showing the total interest charged year to date is on this balance i maintain an excellent credit history and have never missed payments across my accounts with other financial institutions i take my financial responsibilities seriously and this situation was an unexpected outcome that i would have avoided had the terms been clearly disclosed when i contacted customer service on xx xx i was informed that synchrony bank is not responsible for what was communicated by mattress firm employees and that it was my responsibility to review the terms independently on my statements this response is concerning as i relied on the information presented at the time of purchase the deferred interest terms were not explained in a way that would allow a reasonable consumer to understand the financial consequences placing the full responsibility on the consumer after the fact does not reflect transparent or fair disclosure practices i believe these promotional terms were not clearly or adequately disclosed and may be misleading to consumers thank you for your time and consideration', 'i am filing a complaint regarding inaccurate information i made the full payment on xx xx after the payment was processed i was informed that the actual deadline was xx xx due to a grace period calculation and i was then charged the full Representative_Docs: ['i am filing this complaint against midland credit management for failure to validate a debt and continued reporting of unverified information on xx xx year i sent a formal debt validation request pursuant to my rights under the fair debt collection practices act fdcpa b regarding an account midland credit management is reporting account originally with in my request i specifically asked for documentation including the original signed contract a full accounting of the debt a breakdown of the balance and proof of midland credit legal authority to collect the debt to date midland credit has failed to provide any response or documentation despite failing to validate the debt this account continues to be reported on my credit report i do not believe a reasonable investigation or validation was conducted failure to validate a debt while continuing to report or attempt collection may constitute violations of the fdcpa and fcra i am requesting that midland credit management either provide full validation of the debt including all requested documentation or immediately delete this account from all consumer reporting agencies if the account can not be properly validated it should not be reported or collected i am requesting that this matter be reviewed and resolved in accordance with federal law', 'i am submitting this complaint regarding unverified debt collection activity by midland credit management midland credit management is currently reporting a collection account on my consumer credit file i dispute this account in its entirety i have not been provided with sufficient documentation to establish that i have a legal obligation to pay this alleged debt nor has midland credit management demonstrated that they have the legal authority to collect on this account to date midland credit management has failed to provide a complete chain of title documenting how this alleged debt was transferred from the original creditor to their company documentation demonstrating that this specific account was included in any assignment or transfer a copy of the original agreement establishing the alleged obligation a full accounting of the alleged debt as calculated by midland credit management despite the lack of proper validation midland credit management continues to report this account to consumer reporting agencies under the fair debt collection practices act i have the right to request validation of any alleged debt additionally under the fair credit reporting act any information reported must be accurate and verifiable reporting a collection account without providing sufficient documentation to validate the debt raises serious concerns regarding the accuracy and legality of the reporting', 'this is my second complaint to the cfpb against midland credit management regarding an alleged debt they continue to report and attempt to collect without proper validation on xx xx i sent midland credit management a written request for validation of this alleged debt in response midland provided only billing statements from the original creditor bank these statements do not establish that midland credit management owns this account or has the legal authority to collect midland has failed to provide any of the following a bill of sale or purchase agreement a complete chain of assignment identifying my specific account any documentation proving legal ownership or transfer of the alleged debt a signed contract or agreement bearing my signature despite failing to validate the debt midland continues to report this account to and and continues collection activity additionally this account is being reported inaccurately and inconsistently across the credit reporting agencies one bureau reports the account as a debt buyer account while another reports it as a factoring company account this inconsistency demonstrates that the information is not being reported with maximum possible accuracy as required under the fair credit reporting act furthermore the account includes misleading and conflicting dates the date of first delinquency is reported as xx xx while the account is reported as opened on xx xx this creates the false and misleading impression that this is a newly opened account i also disputed this account with the credit reporting agencies and both claim the account was verified or updated yet neither agency provided any documentation demonstrating that midland validated the debt or proved legal ownership this indicates that the credit reporting agencies failed to conduct a reasonable investigation as required under the fair credit reporting act and instead relied solely on information provided by midland i previously filed a complaint regarding this matter and midlands response did not address the core issue of validation instead they repeated that documents were available online without providing proper legal proof of ownership i have attached documentation supporting the following my written validation request to midland credit management midlands inadequate response consisting only of billing statements my prior cfpb complaint and midlands response credit reports showing inconsistent account classification across bureaus investigation results from and showing the account was verified without proper validation based on the above midland credit management is in violation of the fair debt collection practices act by attempting to collect a debt without proper validation and may also be furnishing inaccurate or unverified information in violation of the fair credit reporting act additionally the credit reporting agencies have failed to conduct a reasonable investigation into disputed information i am requesting the following immediate deletion of this account from all credit reporting agencies that midland credit management cease all collection activity until full and proper validation is provided that midland provide documentation proving legal ownership of this alleged debt if such documentation exists if midland credit management can not provide full and complete validation this account must be removed immediately']
